headline: This Could Cut Tesla’s Stock Price By 70%
summary: What if Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is primarily a car company? After months of being beaten down in Europe, Tesla’s sales are making a comeback, where both competition and Elon Musk’s political stances had hurt it last year. In February, EU sales jumped 29% to 13,740. However, it lagged rival BYD, which saw sales increase 185% ... This Could Cut Tesla’s Stock Price By 70%

headline: Woodchuck Partners with Walbridge to Help Advance Customers' Construction Sustainability Goals
summary: Woodchuck, the AI-powered climate-tech startup redefining how construction and manufacturing industries handle wood waste, today announced a joint sustainability initiative with Walbridge, one of the nation's top industrial and automotive constructors. The program supports Ford Motor Company's construction waste-reduction efforts at its new manufacturing facility in Marshall, Mich.

headline: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
summary: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

headline: Ford Recalls 254,000 SUVs Over Software Issues Affecting Driver Assistance Features
summary: Ford issues recall for more than 254,000 SUVs across multiple product lines due to defect which affects the vehicles' camera.
